_title: ISO 9431:1990 — Construction drawings — Spaces for drawing and for text, and title blocks on drawing sheets
scope: Construction drawing folding procedures (A0/A1/A2/A3 → A4 for archival) + spaces for text and title blocks.

key_references_in_this_folder.drawing-fold-procedures.json: §6 — fold sequences A0/A1/A2/A3 → A4 with title block visibility preserved
